title: Minimum Time To Finish The Race
description: Minimize race time over numLaps consecutive laps; tire [f,r] takes f*r^j on its j-th consecutive lap and changing tires costs changeTime between laps. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: tires: list[list[int]], changeTime: int, numLaps: int. 1 <= len(tires) <= 100000; f,r,changeTime <= 100000; 1 <= numLaps <= 1000; Python integers are unbounded.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
